issues.description: Second effect is completely incorrect. Card text says 'your Leader gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' but DSL shows PowerBoost with amount=-4000 (negative, wrong direction) targeting opponent's character (wrong target) with duration EndOfTurn (wrong duration). Should target your own Leader, boost +1000, and use DuringOpponentTurn duration.
Trigger 'Trigger' is invalid and unclear. The power boost should either be part of the OnPlay effect chain or have a clear game trigger. Based on card text, it should be part of OnPlay effect.
